---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, integration, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

**Use case**
How would you use this feature in your workflow?

**IDE / Agent**
Which IDE or AI agent are you using? [e.g. Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, Antigravity]

**Additional context**
Any other details, screenshots, or references.
